title: π0.7: a Steerable Model with Emergent Capabilities
abstract: π0.7 is a general-purpose robotic vision-language-action model that shows a step-change in generalization. It matches specialist-level dexterous performance while also following new language commands, recombining learned skills for unseen tasks, and transferring across robot embodiments.
summary: 这篇博客介绍了 Physical Intelligence 的 π0.7 机器人基础模型。核心结论是：相比过去需要按任务微调的 specialist policy，π0.7 作为一个通用 VLA 模型，已经开始表现出组合泛化能力。它不仅能在已知灵巧操作任务上达到接近甚至超过专用模型的表现，还能根据新的语言指令完成训练中未显式见过的任务，例如在没有专门示范数据的情况下尝试操作空气炸锅，或把在一种机器人上学到的洗衣折叠能力迁移到另一种不同构型的双臂机器人上。文章还强调，模型泛化提升的关键不只是数据更大，而是通过多模态 prompt 在训练时显式告诉模型“做什么”以及“如何做”，从而把语言、元数据、控制模态和视觉子目标统一进同一条件框架。
innovations: 提出可控的通用机器人模型 π0.7，在单一模型中兼顾 specialist-level dexterity 与开放任务泛化。
使用多模态 prompt 条件化训练，把语言说明、速度/质量元数据、控制模态标签和视觉子目标统一纳入输入。
展示了早期组合泛化能力：可依据逐步语言指导完成未专门收集示范的新任务。
展示跨 embodiment transfer：在未针对目标机器人收集特定任务数据的情况下，将技能迁移到不同机器人平台。
通过吸收 RL specialist 产生的数据与策略元数据，使单模型在多个任务上达到接近专用强化学习策略的成功率与吞吐表现。
notes: 当前收录源为官方博客首发文章；页面中提到附带 π0.7 pdf，但当前未单独解析 PDF 文件。

title: Zero-shot World Models Are Developmentally Efficient Learners
abstract: Young children demonstrate early abilities to understand their physical world, estimating depth, motion, object coherence, interactions, and many other aspects of physical scene understanding. Children are both data-efficient and flexible cognitive systems, creating competence despite extremely limited training data, while generalizing to myriad untrained tasks -- a major challenge even for today's best AI systems. Here we introduce a novel computational hypothesis for these abilities, the Zero-shot Visual World Model (ZWM). ZWM is based on three principles: a sparse temporally-factored predictor that decouples appearance from dynamics; zero-shot estimation through approximate causal inference; and composition of inferences to build more complex abilities. We show that ZWM can be learned from the first-person experience of a single child, rapidly generating competence across multiple physical understanding benchmarks. It also broadly recapitulates behavioral signatures of child development and builds brain-like internal representations. Our work presents a blueprint for efficient and flexible learning from human-scale data, advancing both a computational account for children's early physical understanding and a path toward data-efficient AI systems.
summary: 这篇论文提出 Zero-shot Visual World Model（ZWM），试图解释儿童为什么能在极少经验数据下快速形成对物理世界的理解，并把这种机制转化为更数据高效的 AI 学习范式。其核心思想是用一种将外观与动力学解耦的稀疏时序预测器，配合近似因果推断与推断结果组合，来实现对深度、运动、物体一致性和交互等物理场景属性的零样本建模。作者声称，这个模型可以仅从单个儿童的一人称经验中学到，并在多个物理理解基准上快速获得能力，同时复现儿童发展中的行为特征，并形成类脑内部表征。
innovations: 提出 Zero-shot Visual World Model（ZWM），将儿童早期物理理解形式化为零样本世界模型学习问题。
使用稀疏、时间分解的预测器，将视觉外观与场景动力学显式解耦。
将近似因果推断作为零样本估计机制，以从有限经验中生成可泛化能力。
通过组合多个推断过程来构建更复杂的物理认知能力。
展示从人类尺度的一人称儿童经验中实现数据高效学习，并连接儿童发展行为与类脑表征。
notes: 依据用户截图识别标题后，已找到 arXiv 原文并基于原文信息重新核实收录。Subjects: cs.AI, cs.CV。

title: Vision Transformers Need More Than Registers
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs), when pre-trained on large-scale data, provide general-purpose representations for diverse downstream tasks. However, artifacts in ViTs are widely observed across different supervision paradigms and downstream tasks. Through systematic analysis of artifacts in ViTs, we find that their fundamental mechanisms have yet to be sufficiently elucidated. In this paper, through systematic analysis, we conclude that these artifacts originate from a lazy aggregation behavior: ViT uses semantically irrelevant background patches as shortcuts to represent global semantics, driven by global attention and Coarse-grained semantic supervision. Our solution selectively integrates patch features into the CLS token, reducing the influence of background-dominated shortcuts and consistently improving performance across 12 benchmarks under label-, text-, and self-supervision. We hope this work offers a new perspective on ViT behavior.
summary: 这篇论文研究了 Vision Transformer 中常见但解释不足的 artifact 问题。作者通过系统分析指出，问题根源并不只是 register token 不够，而是 ViT 在全局注意力和粗粒度语义监督驱动下，会形成一种“lazy aggregation”行为：用语义并不相关的背景 patch 作为捷径来承载全局语义。为解决这个问题，论文提出一种选择性地把 patch 特征整合进 CLS token 的方法，从而减弱背景主导的 shortcut，对 label supervision、text supervision 和 self-supervision 三种范式下的 12 个 benchmark 都带来稳定提升。作者希望借此提供一个理解 ViT 表征行为的新视角。
innovations: 系统分析 ViT artifact 的成因，并将其归结为一种 lazy aggregation 行为，而不是简单的 token 设计问题。
指出 ViT 会利用语义无关的背景 patch 作为表示全局语义的 shortcut，这与全局注意力和粗粒度监督有关。
提出选择性地将 patch 特征整合进 CLS token 的方法，以减少背景 shortcut 的影响。
在 label、text 和 self-supervision 三类训练范式下的 12 个 benchmark 上获得稳定提升。
为理解 ViT 的内部机制与表征偏差提供了新的分析视角。
notes: 收录源为 arXiv。当前版本为 v2（2026-04-14 修订），arXiv 首次提交时间为 2026-02-25。Comments: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Subjects: cs.CV。

title: Beyond Language Modeling: An Exploration of Multimodal Pretraining
abstract: The visual world offers a critical axis for advancing foundation models beyond language. Despite growing interest in this direction, the design space for native multimodal models remains opaque. We provide empirical clarity through controlled, from-scratch pretraining experiments, isolating the factors that govern multimodal pretraining without interference from language pretraining. We adopt the Transfusion framework, using next-token prediction for language and diffusion for vision, to train on diverse data including text, video, image-text pairs, and even action-conditioned video. Our experiments yield four key insights: (i) Representation Autoencoder (RAE) provides an optimal unified visual representation by excelling at both visual understanding and generation; (ii) visual and language data are complementary and yield synergy for downstream capabilities; (iii) unified multimodal pretraining leads naturally to world modeling, with capabilities emerging from general training; and (iv) Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) enables efficient and effective multimodal scaling while naturally inducing modality specialization. Through IsoFLOP analysis, we compute scaling laws for both modalities and uncover a scaling asymmetry: vision is significantly more data-hungry than language. We demonstrate that the MoE architecture harmonizes this scaling asymmetry by providing the high model capacity required by language while accommodating the data-intensive nature of vision, paving the way for truly unified multimodal models.
summary: 这篇论文系统探索了从零开始进行多模态预训练的设计空间，目标是回答“超越纯语言建模之后，原生多模态基础模型该怎么训”这个问题。作者采用 Transfusion 框架，把语言建模的 next-token prediction 与视觉建模的 diffusion 结合起来，在文本、视频、图文对以及动作条件视频等多种数据上做受控实验。论文总结出四个核心结论：其一，Representation Autoencoder（RAE）在视觉理解和生成两方面都表现突出，是统一视觉表示的优选方案；其二，视觉数据和语言数据是互补的，联合训练会带来下游能力协同；其三，统一的多模态预训练会自然涌现出 world modeling 能力；其四，MoE 架构既能高效扩展多模态模型规模，也会自然形成模态分工。进一步的 IsoFLOP 分析还显示，视觉相较语言明显更“吃数据”，而 MoE 正好有助于协调这种跨模态 scaling asymmetry。
innovations: 通过受控的从零开始预训练实验，系统分析原生多模态模型的关键设计因素，避免语言预训练先验干扰。
采用 Transfusion 框架，将语言 next-token prediction 与视觉 diffusion 统一到同一多模态训练范式中。
提出并验证 RAE 作为统一视觉表示的优选方案，同时兼顾视觉理解与生成能力。
指出统一多模态预训练会自然涌现 world modeling 能力，而不必额外设计专门目标。
通过 IsoFLOP 分析揭示视觉比语言更数据饥渴，并说明 MoE 能协调这种跨模态 scaling asymmetry。
notes: 收录源为 arXiv。Comments 中提到项目主页。Subjects: cs.CV。

title: UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling
abstract: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by the scarcity of robotic data. While massive egocentric human data offers a scalable alternative, bridging the cross-embodiment chasm remains a fundamental challenge due to kinematic mismatches. We introduce UniT (Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring), a framework that establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer. Grounded in the philosophy that heterogeneous kinematics share universal visual consequences, UniT employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics to physical outcomes, while vision reconstructs actions to filter out irrelevant visual confounders. Concurrently, a fusion branch synergies these purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space of embodiment-agnostic physical intents. We validate UniT across two paradigms: 1) Policy Learning (VLA-UniT): By predicting these unified tokens, it effectively leverages diverse human data to achieve state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on both humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments, notably demonstrating zero-shot task transfer. 2) World Modeling (WM-UniT): By aligning cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions, it realizes direct human-to-humanoid action transfer. This alignment ensures that human data seamlessly translates into enhanced action controllability for humanoid video generation. Ultimately, by inducing a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation (empirically verified by t-SNE visualizations revealing the convergence of human and humanoid features into a shared manifold), UniT offers a scalable path to distill vast human knowledge into general-purpose humanoid capabilities.
summary: 这篇论文提出 UniT，目标是为 human-to-humanoid transfer 建立一种统一的“物理语言”，同时服务于策略学习和世界模型。作者认为，人和人形机器人的运动学结构虽然不同，但它们造成的视觉后果具有共通性，因此可以用视觉作为锚点，把异构动作空间对齐到统一离散潜空间中。具体做法是构建一个 tri-branch tokenizer：分别编码视觉、动作和融合后的视动特征，并通过 cross-reconstruction 让动作去预测视觉、让视觉去重建动作，从而滤除各自模态中的噪声和混杂因素。基于这一统一 token，论文进一步构建了 VLA-UniT 和 WM-UniT：前者把统一 token 作为策略学习目标，提高人形机器人上的数据效率、OOD 泛化与零样本任务迁移；后者把统一 token 作为世界模型的条件，实现 human-to-humanoid action transfer，并提升类人机器人视频生成中的动作可控性。整体上，这项工作试图把大量人类数据中的知识蒸馏到通用 humanoid 能力中。
innovations: 提出 UniT（Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring），将 human 与 humanoid 的异构动作映射到共享离散潜空间，形成统一物理语言。
设计 tri-branch cross-reconstruction 机制，联合建模视觉、动作和融合表征，并通过双向重建实现跨模态对齐与去噪。
将 UniT 同时用于两类 embodied AI 范式：VLA policy learning 与 world modeling，提供统一的 token 接口。
在 policy learning 中展示更高的数据效率、更强 OOD 泛化，以及 human-to-humanoid 的 zero-shot task transfer。
在 world modeling 中利用统一 token 作为条件，实现跨 embodiment 动力学对齐与更强的人形机器人视频生成可控性。
notes: 依据用户上传 PDF 文件名识别 arXiv 编号 2604.19734，并已基于 arXiv 原文核实收录。Project page: https://xpeng-robotics.github.io/unit/ Subjects: cs.RO, cs.AI。

title: JoyAI-RA 0.1: A Foundation Model for Robotic Autonomy
abstract: Robotic autonomy in open-world environments is fundamentally limited by insufficient data diversity and poor cross-embodiment generalization. Existing robotic datasets are often limited in scale and task coverage, while relatively large differences across robot embodiments impede effective behavior knowledge transfer. To address these challenges, we propose JoyAI-RA, a vision-language-action (VLA) embodied foundation model tailored for generalizable robotic manipulation. JoyAI-RA presents a multi-source multi-level pretraining framework that integrates web data, large-scale egocentric human manipulation videos, simulation-generated trajectories, and real-robot data. Through training on heterogeneous multi-source data with explicit action-space unification, JoyAI-RA effectively bridges embodiment gaps, particularly between human manipulation and robotic control, thereby enhancing cross-embodiment behavior learning. JoyAI-RA outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both simulation and real-world benchmarks, especially on diverse tasks with generalization demands.
summary: 这篇论文提出 JoyAI-RA，一个面向通用机器人操作的 VLA 基础模型。核心思路是用多源多级预训练框架，把网页数据、大规模人称视角人类操作视频、仿真轨迹和真实机器人数据统一到同一个训练流程中，并通过显式的动作空间统一来解决跨 embodiment 差异——尤其是人类操作与机器人控制之间的鸿沟。实验表明，JoyAI-RA 在仿真和真实场景基准上都超越了当前 SOTA，特别在泛化需求高的多样化任务上表现突出。
innovations: 提出多源多级预训练框架，整合网页数据、人称视角人类操作视频、仿真轨迹与真实机器人数据。
通过显式动作空间统一（action-space unification）桥接不同机器人形态之间的差距。
重点解决人类操作数据到机器人控制的跨 embodiment 迁移问题。
在仿真和真实世界基准上超越 SOTA，尤其擅长泛化到多样化任务场景。
作为 VLA 基础模型，兼顾数据规模和跨 embodiment 泛化。
notes: 依据用户提供的 arXiv 链接收录。61 位作者。Subjects: cs.RO。

title: OmniShow: Unifying Multimodal Conditions for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation
abstract: In this work, we study Human-Object Interaction Video Generation (HOIVG), which aims to synthesize high-quality human-object interaction videos conditioned on text, reference images, audio, and pose. This task holds significant practical value for automating content creation in real-world applications, such as e-commerce demonstrations, short video production, and interactive entertainment. However, existing approaches fail to accommodate all these requisite conditions. We present OmniShow, an end-to-end framework tailored for this practical yet challenging task, capable of harmonizing multimodal conditions and delivering industry-grade performance. To overcome the trade-off between controllability and quality, we introduce Unified Channel-wise Conditioning for efficient image and pose injection, and Gated Local-Context Attention to ensure precise audio-visual synchronization. To effectively address data scarcity, we develop a Decoupled-Then-Joint Training strategy that leverages a multi-stage training process with model merging to efficiently harness heterogeneous sub-task datasets. Furthermore, to fill the evaluation gap in this field, we establish HOIVG-Bench, a dedicated and comprehensive benchmark for HOIVG. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniShow achieves overall state-of-the-art performance across various multimodal conditioning settings, setting a solid standard for the emerging HOIVG task.
summary: 这篇论文提出 OmniShow，面向 Human-Object Interaction Video Generation（HOIVG）任务：在同一个视频生成框架中同时接入文本、参考图像、音频和姿态条件，生成高质量的人物-物体交互视频。论文重点不是提出全新的生成 backbone，而是解决实际落地中多模态条件难统一、可控性与质量难兼顾、以及训练数据稀缺的问题。方法上，OmniShow 使用 Unified Channel-wise Conditioning 注入图像和姿态条件，用 Gated Local-Context Attention 改善音频-视觉同步，并设计 Decoupled-Then-Joint Training：先利用异构子任务数据分别训练，再通过联合训练和模型融合适配完整 HOIVG 任务。论文还提出 HOIVG-Bench，用于评估多模态条件下的人物-物体交互视频生成能力。
innovations: 定义并系统研究 HOIVG：同时由文本、参考图像、音频和姿态驱动的人物-物体交互视频生成任务。
提出 OmniShow 端到端框架，统一多种条件输入，在可控性、质量和工业级生成效果之间做折中。
设计 Unified Channel-wise Conditioning，用于高效注入图像与姿态条件。
提出 Gated Local-Context Attention，以增强音频和视觉动作之间的局部同步。
提出 Decoupled-Then-Joint Training，通过多阶段训练、异构子任务数据利用和模型融合缓解完整多模态数据稀缺。
建立 HOIVG-Bench，为多模态人物-物体交互视频生成提供专门评测基准。
notes: 依据用户转发截图识别标题与 arXiv 编号 2604.11804，已基于 arXiv 原文核实收录。当前版本为 v2（2026-04-17 修订）；项目页：https://correr-zhou.github.io/OmniShow/。Subjects: cs.CV。
